author: driver--design-phase-6-facade-examples-md-fc82
content: Plan: Implement facade crate with App builder (wrapping DesktopRuntime/WebApp), theme() bridge, selective a11y re-exports, and resolve glob re-export conflicts (Key, Corners, CursorIcon between events/style/widgets). Then implement 4 example apps exercising the full API surface. Key files: crates/vitreous/src/lib.rs, examples/{counter,todo,dashboard,file_explorer}/src/main.rs
